title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarTrade - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarTrade - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CarTrade invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarTrade:
CarTrade is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade!
